range.value: close (25 ft. + 5 ft./2 levels) Target or Area see text

description.value: You hurl a tiny ball of negative energy, destroying plant life either in a line 60 feet long or a 10-foot-radius spread. This effect removes the cover and concealment provided by trees and undergrowth, eliminates the movement penalties associated with undergrowth, and so forth. You may also target a single plant creature with this spell. You must succeed on a ranged touch attack to hit your target. An affected plant creature takes 2d8 points of damage.
